'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=5S_MiwcGbD53R2PGotL81YXP3iNS3PM8cPZHp1.wgj0-1773232079-1.0.1.1-7XOcRub3iMRHVn3aTr2hluwa0_k42njfnSjpuL6EnJM"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
